name: Coconut Peanut Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 lb chicken breasts (without skin), cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
Dipping Sauce
3 tbsp honey
3 tbsp orange marmalade
1 tbsp soy sauce
1/2 tsp prepared mustard
1. Combine peanuts and coconut flakes in a medium-sized bowl.
2. Place flour in a separate bowl and lightly beat eggs in another bowl.
3. Dip chicken pieces first in flour, then egg, and finally roll them in the peanut mixture. Place on a baking sheet.
4. Heat enough oil in a skillet to reach a depth of 1/2 inch over medium heat. Cook the chicken in batches of about 6 pieces for 4-6 minutes until cooked through and lightly golden, turning once. Adjust the heat as necessary to prevent burning. Drain on paper towels.
5. Combine all sauce ingredients in a small bowl.
